Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed holidays (541) 266-6700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY SOLUTIONS SOUTHERN OREGON FAMILY SOLUTIONS ASHLAND PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program offering a range of year-round support for children with severe emotional or behavioral issues with therapy, skills training, and an on-site classroom. 1836 Fremont Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 5-12 who are experiencing serious, long-term emotional and/or behavioral problems and have a recent mental health assessment documenting the presence of a treatable mental health diagnosis. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm. Youth attend the program Monday-Friday 8am-2:15pm. Email (541) 479-2966 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEWORKS NW LIFEWORKS NW GLADSTONE DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Nickerson Adolescent Day Treatment Program provides mental health treatment and academic services. 18907 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Ages 11-18 who are experiencing serious psychiatric difficulties Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEWORKS NW LIFEWORKS NW ST JOHNS DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Nickerson Adolescent Day Treatment Program provides mental health treatment and academic services. 8425 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Ages 11-18 who are experiencing serious psychiatric difficulties Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides therapeutic support to children, teens, and their families. Services include counseling, therapeutic day treatment schooling programs, and in-home supportive services. Offers therapeutic Foster Care for forster children and teens who have emotional, behavioral, and/or medical needs. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Youth involved in the child welfare or juvenile justice systems Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 436-0333 345 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OLD MILL CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers counseling services for families and children as well as Intensive Treatment Services (ITS). Referrals to the ITS program generally come via Bento County's Coordinationg team. ITS provides psychiatric day treatment for preschool- and school-aged children with emotional and behavioral challenges and their families. Children enrolled in the ITS program have been unsuccessful at home, typical preschool, child care, and/or public school. 1650 SW 45th Place Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individual and Family Counseling: Families with children ages 3-18 Intensive Treatment Services: Ages 3-7 with emotional and behavioral challenges and their families Hours: By appointment Email (541) 757-8068 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated psychiatric day treatment and specialized education services in community and public school settings. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Children ages 3-12 with severe emotional, behavioral or mental, emotional disorder as determined by a mental health assessment.
